known_issues: Only logout option visible in menu after Version 20 deployment

existing_features.title: Restore all navigation menu items in the Header component that were visible before Version 20. Ensure authenticated users see 'My Events', 'Find Organizers', 'My Bookings', and 'Organizer Dashboard' links in addition to the logout button.
Verify that the navigation menu conditional rendering logic correctly handles authenticated vs unauthenticated states without hiding menu items inappropriately.
